restaurants.name: Ristorante Locanda Locarnese
restaurants.ambience: Refined Mediterranean-Italian ambiance right on Piazza Grande, recognized in the Michelin Guide

restaurants.name: Ristorante Piazza Grande
restaurants.ambience: Central and charming—located in a boutique hotel in a historic building on the square. Serves all meals from breakfast through late evening with outdoor seating and a warm, casual vibe

restaurants.name: Al Borgo Bistrot
restaurants.ambience: Cozy Mediterranean bistro a short walk from Piazza Grande, relaxed, café-style setting for lunch or early dinner

restaurants.name: Ristorante vegetariano Govinda
restaurants.hours: 10:00 AM - 3 PM, 6:00 PM - 10:30 PM; closed on Sunday
restaurants.ambience: Natural vegetarian restaurant with Indian/Asian influences. Pleasant relaxed interior, quiet street atmosphere, also a lovely small terrace / courtyard. The vibe is calm, colourful, and cosy — often praised by locals as a peaceful alternative among the busier spots in Locarno

restaurants.name: Osteria Reginetta
restaurants.ambience: An elegant, tranquil Mediterranean-inspired osteria tucked just off the pedestrian old-town zone—perfect for a romantic dinner or relaxed evening
must_try_dishes: Mediterranean fish dishes prepared with fresh, seasonal ingredients

restaurants.name: La Prosciutteria
restaurants.ambience: Casual yet refined spot offering a contemporary Italian vibe—great for sharing plates and relaxed dinners
must_try_dishes: Gnocchi with pomodorini, stracciatella & basilico fresco

attractions.name: Lake Maggiore
attractions.description: Beautiful lake with promenade and boat rides to nearby towns like Ascona and Brissago Islands

attractions.name: Piazza Grande
attractions.description: The heart of Locarno, famous for its film festival and lively squares with cafés

attractions.name: Cardada Cable Car
attractions.description: Panoramic views of Lake Maggiore, surrounding valleys, and the highest peaks

hotels.name: Hotel la Palma au Lac
hotels.location: 2 hr 37 min from zurich airport by public transport

transport_options.description: Bus service to remote villages like Foroglio
